title: Rama Rao on Duty
subTitle: A courageous and honest police officer investigates the case of the missing husband of his ex-girlfriend, which leads him to bust a scam pertaining to the illegal smuggling of red sandalwood.

title: Top Gear
subTitle: Arjun, a taxi driver, finds himself in trouble when one of his customers turns out to be a drug dealer. When the kingpin kidnaps Arjun's wife, he strives to save her.

title: Jabardast Jodi
subTitle: Two young men who fall in love with a woman in their neighbourhood, try several ways in order to attract and win her over.

title: Amigos
subTitle: Three identical men befriend each other through a doppelganger-finding application and things go well until the criminal past of one amongst them emerges.

title: Officer On Duty
subTitle: A demoted cop looks into fake jewelry criminals, getting caught up in a risky world of bad guys, putting his life in danger as he tries to solve the case.

title: Animal
subTitle: The hard-hearted son of a successful factory owner returns to his family after spending years in abroad and pledges to seek revenge on the people who pose a threat to his father's life.

title: Good Bad & Ugly
subTitle: A formidable crime lord strives for tranquility, abandoning his brutal history. Despite lingering shadows, he confronts his past with unwavering resolve.

title: Diljala Aashiq
subTitle: A happy-go-lucky radio jockey falls for a man in a very unusual way. However, they must overcome many obstacles, including their different perspectives on life, to be together.

title: A Aa
subTitle: Anasuya is the daughter of Mahalakshmi, a rich and strict businesswoman. Her life takes a turn for the better when her father sends her to a village to visit her aunt.

title: Bagheera
subTitle: A psycho killer creates an application to kill women who get a complaint about cheating on their man. However, his life changes when he meets a psychology student.

title: Eleven
subTitle: A seasoned police officer begins an investigation after a series of gruesome murders targeting twins comes to light. However, he soon encounters a sinister game of psychological manipulation.

title: Eleven
subTitle: A seasoned police officer begins an investigation after a series of gruesome murders targeting twins comes to light. However, he soon encounters a sinister game of psychological manipulation.

title: Laabam
subTitle: After returning to his home town from exile, Pakkiri, challenges Vanagamudi, the village chief. Soon, with the locals support he then tries to overhaul the village's farming techniques.

title: Ungala Podanum Sir
subTitle: A group of individuals goes through different phases of life that involve hilarious and supernatural incidents while living together for jobs.

title: Extraaa Storiez
subTitle: Join the host as they dive into the movie's plot while sharing fun behind-the-scenes moments. Get ready for an entertaining blend of insights and laughs that highlight filmmaking magic!

title: Extraaa Storiez
subTitle: The host presents various snippets of information and behind the scenes from the sets of 'K.G.F: Chapter 2', a 2022 Kannada film.

title: Zara Hatke Zara Bachke
subTitle: Eager to escape their cramped joint family life, Kapil and Saumya devise a risky plan involving a fake separation, only to be caught in a web of comical complications.

title: A.aa 2
subTitle: A young man with dreams of making it big in the USA falls in love with an NRI woman residing there. She breaks up with him for reasons unknown to him but serendipity plays cupid.

title: Maaman
subTitle: A complex relationship unfolds between an uncle and his nephew, testing their family ties through emotional turmoil and personal conflicts.

title: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion
subTitle: After learning that his father was brutally killed by Bhallaladeva, Mahendra Baahubali raises an army to defeat him and release his mother from the former's captivity.

title: House Mates
subTitle: Newlyweds Karthik and Anu move into an old apartment where strange occurrences unsettle their lives, leading them to uncover a paranormal mystery involving another family nearby.

title: Voter
subTitle: A man returns to India to cast his vote and falls in love with a woman. Later, he embarks on a mission when she challenges him to make a minister fulfil his promises.

title: Srinivasa Kalyanam
subTitle: Srinivas, an architect, wants to marry Sridevi, the daughter of a businessman in a traditional ceremony. Conflicts arise when his views on marriage don't align with that of Sridevi's father.

title: PK
subTitle: An innocent alien lands on Earth but loses his communication device. However, he meets Jaggu, a heartbroken reporter, and tries to find his device with her help.

title: Nela Ticket
subTitle: An orphan boy, Nela Ticket, is raised by Ananda Bhupathi at his orphanage in Bangalore. Years later, when Ananda is killed by a corrupt politician, Nela sets out to take revenge.

title: Nela Ticket
subTitle: An orphan boy, Nela Ticket, is raised by Ananda Bhupathi at his orphanage in Bangalore. Years later, when Ananda is killed by a corrupt politician, Nela sets out to take revenge.

title: Hatya
subTitle: When Sagar finds a boy on the street, he brings him home and treats him well. But, he soon finds that the boy's mother has been killed and that he has become the prime suspect.

title: Ashwamedham
subTitle: Dhruva, an undercover agent, works to thwart a massive cyberattack. However, he struggles against hackers who seem to predict his every move, staying one step ahead.

title: Insidious: The Last Key
subTitle: Parapsychologist Elise Rainier gets thrust into returning to her eerie childhood home where she and her family have to fight a dangerous otherworldly entity.

title: Marjaavan
subTitle: Gangster Raghu works for Narayan Anna, the local don, and is his favourite henchman. However, Vishnu, Narayan's son, is jealous of Raghu's popularity with his father and schemes against him.

title: Tu Jhoothi Main Makkaar
subTitle: Tinni and Micky fall in love and introduce each other to the respective families. However, after meeting Micky's overbearing family, Tinni contacts a break-up consultant to sabotage the wedding.

title: Gangers
subTitle: Saravanan, an undercover officer disguised as a PT master, confronts merciless criminals, unearths their fraud and recruits school personnel to dismantle their operation.

title: Main Hoon Lucky the Racer
subTitle: Two brothers, who are polar opposites, have always been at odds with each other since childhood. However, their enmity with a wicked politician unites them.

title: Anek
subTitle: Madhu, an animator, is plagued by recurring thoughts about her previous life. Her life takes a turn when she meets someone from her mysterious past.

title: Warning 2
subTitle: The situation intensifies when Geja, who failed to assassinate Pamma, ends up in the same prison as him, determined to complete the task.

title: Baahubali
subTitle: Raised by a tribe, a young man sets out to help his lady love rescue an enslaved princess of a kingdom that is ruled by a tyrannical king. In doing so, he soon discovers his true identity.

title: Ek Chatur Naar
subTitle: A seemingly innocent woman unsettles a small town as her sharp wit and hidden motives spark a tense and darkly comic clash of minds.
